zh.lifeSummary: 當Liutgard von Kirchberg於大約1250年出生時，她的父親Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten42歲，母親Uta von Neuffen32歲。她和Walter V. von Vaz至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1326年5月24日在艾歐洛享年77歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kirchberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of various places called Kirchberg in Rhineland, Saxony, or Württemberg.
German: topographic name for someone living at a church on a hill or on a hill so named, from Middle High German kirche ‘church’ + berc ‘mountain, hill’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Kirchberg ‘church mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Liutgard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Liutgard von Kirchberg was born about 1250, her father, Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten, was 42 and her mother, Uta von Neuffen, was 32. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Walter V. von Vaz. She died on 24 May 1326, in Europe, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Liutgard von Kirchberg est née environ 1250, son père, Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Uta von Neuffen, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Walter V. von Vaz. Elle est décédée le 24 mai 1326, à Europe, à l’âge de 77 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Liutgard von Kirchberg è nata il circa 1250, sua padre, Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Uta von Neuffen, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Walter V. von Vaz. Morì il 24 maggio 1326, nel Europa, all'età di 77 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Liutgard von Kirchberg(이)가 대략 1250년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Uta von Neuffen(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Walter V. von Vaz(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 5월 24일 우럽에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Walter V. von Vaz. Ela faleceu em 24 de maio de 1326, em Europa, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Liutgard von Kirchberg родилась около 1250 г., её отцу по имени Eberhard von Kirchberg-Wullenstetten было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Uta von Neuffen, 32. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Walter V. von Vaz. Она умерла 24 мая 1326 г. в местности Европа в возрасте 77 лет.
